93.reason: [Loop runs from 0 to n1 inclusive, but x1 has valid indices from 0 to n1-1. The first polynomial was read with initial term at i=0, then loop from i=1 to i=n1-1 (since break happens after reading nth term). Thus n1 equals number of terms, so last valid index is n1-1. This causes out-of-bound access to x1[n1].]

The first polynomial was read with initial term at i=0, then loop from i=1 to i=n1-1 (since break happens after reading nth term). Thus n1 equals number of terms, so last valid index is n1-1. This causes out-of-bound access to x1[n1].]
